parties.name: BROWN, CYRENA MAE 82 CARR STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA

calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nemer for Elston Mallory (Petitioner). Thomas Shelton (Former Attorney for the Adminstrator).

The Court stated that the accounting was in order and that the recommended fees were ok. The Parties had nothing to add. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Anderson.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Denied

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Continued To May-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-13-2008 Continued To Apr-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nemer for Elston Mallory.

Mr. Nemer stated that he was still waiting for the amended inheritance tax, and that he was not ready to proceed. The matter was continued to April 9, 2008. The Court will contact the probate referee.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar Feb-13-2008 Continued To Apr-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Continued To Feb-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Nemer for the Administrator.

Mr. Nemer reported that they have not obtained consent from the lender to distribute the property, they have not obtained a modified inheritance tax order, the fiduciary income tax return has not been filed, and the sums paid from escrow to Mr. Shelton without a court ourder were still outstanding issues. In addition, he stated that he was not in a condition to proceed and requested a continuance. The matter was continued to February 13, 2008 for further status.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Smith.

MINI MINUTES: Thomas Shelton does not stipulate to have the hearing before the Commissioner. David Nemer is in court. Mr. Shelton's petition is continued to 6/12. The status of administration is pre-approved. Order signed. The next status date is set on 11/27/07.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patricia Abalos CSR# 13128. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

Report Of Elston Mallory Of Status Of Administration

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Continued To May-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: David Nemer appearing for petitioner. Thomas Shelton appearing as former attorney. Mr. Nemer reported that Elizabeth Brown has been appointed the administrator for Walter Brown and Letters of administration has been issued. Leamon King, Jr. has been appointed the administrtor for Peggy King. Letters of administration has not been issued. Matter is continued to 5/15. Mr. Shelton can file his petition and set it for hearing on 5/15.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Continued To Mar-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: David Nemer appearing for administrator. Thomas Shelton appearing as former attorney. Mr. Nemer reported on the appointment of an administrator for Walter Brown and the pending appointment of administrator for Peggy King. He will not be able to file a final account and petition for final distribution until all parties are in place. Court is continuing the status to 3/6.
On Mr. Shelton's fee petition, Court can not do anything until final distribution. Matter is continued to 3/6 also. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karla Davis, CSR#12998. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar Aug-09-2006 Continued To Sep-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARENCES BY THOMAS SHELTON, ATTY. FOR ESTATE; DAVID NEMER, ATTY. ADMINISTRATOR
ATTORNEY STATUTORY FEES IS BASED ON WRONG DATE. MR NEMER STATE THE THERE WAS NO REAL ESTATE SALE, FEE SHOULD BE BASED ON DATE OF DEATH. COURT SAYS THAT FEE WILL NOT BE CONCIDER UNTIL THE FINAL ACCOUNTING IN COMPLETED. MR. SHELTON STATES THAT HE HAS SHOWN DUE DILIGENCE IN FINDING AND GIVING THE INFORMATION FOR THE ACCOUNTING TO MR. NEMER. MR. NEMER IS WAITING ON CORRESPONDENCE, RECEIPTS, CANCELED CHECKS AS WELL AS OTHER INFO. TO COMPLETE FINAL ACCOUTING. THERE IS ALSO A QUESTION ABOUT THE DISTRIBUTIONS IN THE WALTER BROWN AND PEGGY KING EATATES.
JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; RPTR:CHRISTINA PAXTON

MINI MINUTES: Thomas Shelton appearing as former attorney. David Nemer appearing for Elston Mallory. Court received Mr. Shelton's filing late yesterday. Mr. Shelton requests for two weeks continuance for Mr. Nemer to respond to his questions under oath. Court is granting the continuance but court is not ordering Mr. Nemer to respond under oath. Petition Of Elston Mallory For Substitution Of Attys And For Delivery Of File
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: David Nemer appearing for petitioner, Elston Mallory. Thomas Shelton, soon to be former counsel is in court. Mr. Shelton does not object to the petition. He has turn over his file and an accounting yesterday. He agrees to pay the petitioner $40.00 for hearing fee. He has filed a petition for fees. It is set for hearing on 6/13. Matter granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
